title: dryopteris subsageniacea
intro: Dryopteris subsageniacea, also known as the autumn fern, is a species of fern native to Japan, characterized by its delicate, lacy fronds. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dryopteris subsageniacea are said to include reducing blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and alleviating symptoms of fever and rheumatism. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use is not widely documented in modern medicine.
